title: 3 High-Yielding Dividend Stocks That May Hike Their Payouts in the Next 2 Years
text: These are stocks all income investors should consider buying and holding.

title: Tapestry Stock Could Overcome Technical Resistance
text: Tapestry Inc (NYSE:TPR) is down 1.9% at $36.21 at last check, after Jefferies raised the stock's price target to $47 from $45, following the company's Investor Day, where it detailed three-year targets that were above analysts' expectations.

title: Luxury Fashion Brands Race to Prep for ‘Millennial Domination'
text: As much as luxury apparel brands are mapping out their omnichannel future to tap into changing demographic trends and more brand-engaged consumers, there's one big blind spot that needs to be addressed.
